code:
sequenceDiagram participant C as Customer participant W as Web Frontend participant A as API Server participant D as Database participant S as Staff participant F as File Storage Note over C,F: Manual Payment Flow %% Start Payment C->>W: Click "Pay Now" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/start Note right of W: {Infra_WorkerNode} A->>D: Create Payment record Note right of A: status: PENDING D-->>A: Payment created A-->>W: {Infra_RedisCache} W-->>C: Show payment instructions %% Upload Proof C->>W: Upload payment proof W->>A: POST /payments/manual/proof Note right of W: multipart/form-data
{Infra_IngressController} A->>F: Store proof file Note right of A: Validate file type, size F-->>A: File stored A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: UNDER_REVIEW
proofUrl: file_path D-->>A: Payment updated A-->>W: {Infra_RedisCache} W-->>C: "Payment under review" %% Staff Review S->>W: Login to admin panel W->>A: GET /admin/payments/pending A->>D: Query pending payments D-->>A: Pending payments A-->>W: List of pending payments W-->>S: Show payment details & proof alt Payment Approved S->>W: Click "Approve" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {Infra_RedisCache} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: SUCCEEDED
reviewedAt: now(Infra_WorkerNode) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: PAID
paidAt: now(Infra_WorkerNode) D-->>A: Order updated A->>D: Create Delivery Note right of A: Generate token hash
status: PENDING D-->>A: Delivery created A-->>W: {Infra_EtcdCluster} W-->>S: "Payment approved" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_APPROVED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status else Payment Rejected S->>W: Click "Reject" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {Infra_RedisCache} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: FAILED
reviewedAt: now(Infra_RedisCache) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: CANCELED
canceledAt: now(Infra_EtcdCluster) D-->>A: Order updated A-->>W: {Infra_RedisCache} W-->>S: "Payment rejected" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_REJECTED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status end %% Customer Response C->>W: Check payment status W->>A: GET /orders/{Infra_WorkerNode} A->>D: Query order with payment D-->>A: Order data A-->>W: Order details W-->>C: Show updated status alt Payment Approved C->>W: Access delivery W->>A: POST /deliveries/reveal Note right of W: {Infra_WorkerNode} A->>D: Verify token & update delivery Note right of A: revealsLeft: 0
revealedAt: now(Infra_WorkerNode) D-->>A: Delivery updated A-->>W: {Infra_LoadBalancer} W-->>C: Show delivery content end
repo_description: KMB monorepo (web + api) with Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, Turborepo, full security hardening and CI/CD

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个手动付款流程的时序图，涉及顾客、Web前端、API服务器、数据库、客服人员和文件存储这几个参与方。核心场景是顾客线下付款后上传凭证，客服人工审核。
明白了。这个流程里基础设施层需要体现哪些组件？比如Redis缓存、Worker节点这些要不要标注出来？
要的，关键节点标注一下。Worker节点负责时间戳生成，Redis做响应缓存，Etcd用于审核状态的一致性存储，再加一个Ingress Controller处理文件上传，Load Balancer放在最后交付环节。
好的，我先画出主干流程：顾客点击"立即付款"，前端POST到API创建待支付记录，状态设为PENDING，然后返回付款指引给顾客。
接下来是上传凭证环节。顾客把转账截图传上来，这里要用multipart/form-data，经过Ingress Controller，文件存到File Storage，同时Payment状态改成UNDER_REVIEW。
已添加。现在进入客服审核分支，我画客服登录后台，查询待审核列表，看到付款详情和凭证图片。这里用alt画两个分支：通过和驳回，可以吗？
可以。通过分支里，客服点击"通过"，Payment状态变SUCCEEDED，同时要级联更新Order为PAID，还要创建Delivery生成取货令牌。这三个数据库操作都走Worker节点打时间戳。
审核结果怎么通知顾客？我打算用SSE推送到顾客端，同时Etcd存审核状态的最终一致性。
对的，SSE推送payment.status。驳回分支类似，状态变FAILED，Order变CANCELED，时间戳这次用Redis记录，最后同样发SSE通知。
两个分支都画好了。最后我补一个顾客查询状态的循环，以及通过后顾客取货的细节：验证令牌、扣减次数、Load Balancer返回内容。
取货环节有个问题——令牌验证和更新应该在同一个Worker节点事务里完成，你分开画了。还有，Delivery创建时的token hash生成也要标注是Worker节点。
已修正，把Verify token和update delivery合并为同一个数据库交互，token hash生成和取货验证都标注Infra_WorkerNode。整个手动付款流程的时序图完成了，从创建到审核再到最终交付，基础设施组件也都标注在对应位置。
elements_involved: Note over C,F: Manual Payment Flow
